query: GTA 6 gameplay leak November 2025 demo reel character animations details

mako.raw:
{"query":"GTA 6 gameplay leak November 2025 demo reel character animations details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1084,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/gaming/gta-vi-demo-reel-leaks-online-reveals-new-character-and-more/articleshow/125691279.cms","title":"GTA 6: GTA VI demo reel leaks online, reveals new character and more | - The Times of India","content":"Leaked gameplay footage of GTA VI has surfaced online.
A former Rockstar Games employee is reportedly behind the leak.
The footage shows new player animations and hints at game features.
This comes as Rockstar Games fired over 30 employees for sharing confidential data.
GTA VI is set to launch in November 2026 in Vice City.
The short demo reel suggests potential hints about new gameplay features and provides purported details regarding the game’s main characters ahead of its November 2026 launch.
According to multiple reports online, including one from Game Rant, the leaked footage was included as part of an unnamed former employee’s demo reel.
It primarily focused on showcasing new player animations, which includes bicycle rentals and truck bed riding.One clip shows a generic player character interacting with what appears to be a bike rental station, demonstrating smooth animations for both mounting and dismounting a bicycle.
The second animation features one of the game's confirmed protagonists, Lucia Caminos, hopping off the roof of a truck and onto the ground.The demo reel also contained animation samples from other Rockstar titles, including Red Dead Redemption 2, GTA 5, and Max Payne 3, essentially pointing towards its authenticity as internal development material.
Last month, Rockstar Games, the studio behind the GTA series, terminated over 30 employees for sharing confidential company information in public forums.
It has been rumoured that the version of Vice City map in GTA VI will have significantly deeper environments with far more interior spaces for players to explore."}]}
